data.title: New York Begins Handing $1,200 To Residents Per Month in Guaranteed Income Pilot Program – Here’s Who Will Receive the No Strings Attached Payments
data.description:
New York City has officially launched a guaranteed income pilot program to test whether cash handouts can help people achieve self-sufficiency and stability. The $1. 5 million initiative is giving monthly no-strings-attached payments of $1,200 to young adults aged 18 through 24 who have struggled with homelessness
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2026/02/13/new-york-begins-handing-1200-to-residents-per-month-in-guaranteed-income-pilot-program-heres-who-will-receive-the-no-strings-attached-payments/

data.title: Magicians Experience Surge in Popularity
data.description: Professional magicians are currently enjoying a significant rise in popularity. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the growing interest in magic performances and the increasing demand for skilled magicians. This trend is attributed to the unique entertainment value that magic offers, captivating audiences with its blend of mystery and skill. As more people seek engaging and interactive experiences, magicians are finding new opportunities to showcase their talents in various venues and events. The resurgence of interest in magic is also reflected in the media, with more coverage and features on prominent magicians and their performances. This renewed fascination with magic is providing a boost to the industry, encouraging both established and emerging magicians to innovate and expand their repertoire.

data.title: IREN joins MSCI USA Index as inclusion takes effect Feb 27
data.description:
IREN’s addition to the MSCI USA Index effective Feb. 27 lifts visibility and passive flows, as MSCI shelves a crypto exclusion plan and IREN pivots to AI.
source: https://coincu.com/news/iren-joins-msci-usa-index-as-inclusion-takes-effect-feb-27/

data.title: Regulatory Debate Intensifies Over Stablecoin Yield Activities
data.description: Wall Street bankers have urged the White House to implement a complete ban on stablecoin yield activities. According to NS3.AI, this move has prompted a crypto advocacy group to present counterarguments, stressing the importance of preserving certain stablecoin rewards. This exchange underscores the ongoing regulatory debate surrounding stablecoin yield practices.

data.title: X-Energy Reactor Co. Secures Federal Approval for Uranium Fuel Production
data.description: X-Energy Reactor Co., an advanced nuclear company, has obtained federal approval to manufacture uranium fuel for advanced reactors, marking the first new license of its kind in over five decades. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significance of this development in the nuclear energy sector. The approval represents a pivotal moment for X-Energy Reactor Co., as it aims to advance nuclear technology and fuel production capabilities. This milestone is expected to contribute to the growth and innovation within the nuclear industry, potentially influencing future energy strategies.

data.title: Income Disparity Persists for Women of Color
data.description: Women of color continue to face significant income disparities, earning approximately 65 cents for every dollar earned by men. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that despite these financial challenges, many women of color often assume the roles of primary breadwinners and caretakers within their families. This ongoing wage gap underscores the broader economic inequalities that persist across various sectors.

data.title: Grayscale Opens Private Placement for Accredited Investors
data.description: Grayscale has announced the opening of a private placement for eligible accredited investors. Grayscale posted on X. This opportunity is available for those who meet the necessary accreditation criteria, allowing them to participate in the investment offering. The private placement aims to provide investors with access to specific investment opportunities, adhering to regulatory requirements and offering potential benefits to those who qualify. Further details and disclosures are available for interested parties.

data.title: Risks Associated with Private Placement Securities Highlighted
data.description: Grayscale posted on X that private placement securities are characterized by their speculative nature and illiquidity. These investments carry significant risks, including the possibility of losing the entire investment. Investors are advised to consider these factors carefully before engaging in such financial activities.

data.title: Large Transfer of SOL Tokens to Wintermute Identified
data.description: A significant transfer of SOL tokens has been detected, involving 52,000 SOL. According to ChainCatcher, this transaction occurred at 03:18, with the tokens moving from an anonymous address, beginning with Ax6Yh, to Wintermute. The transfer highlights ongoing activity in the cryptocurrency market, with Wintermute being a notable player in the industry.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 620 USDT with a 1.82% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 13, 2026, 19:22 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 620 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 620.159973 USDT, with a narrowed 1.82% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Hedge Fund Citadel Maintains Employee Pay Despite Lower Returns
data.description: Employee compensation at Ken Griffin's Citadel remained steady last year, even as returns decreased. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significant expenses associated with managing large multistrategy hedge funds, especially in a competitive environment for talent acquisition. Despite the challenges, Citadel's decision to uphold pay levels reflects the firm's commitment to retaining skilled professionals in a demanding market.

data.title: Peru's Economy Poised to Benefit from Commodities Boom in 2026
data.description: The chief executive of a major Peruvian bank expressed confidence in the country's economic prospects, anticipating that the mining-driven economy will continue to thrive amid a commodities boom in 2026. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this optimism persists despite the potential disruptions from upcoming general elections and ongoing political instability. The executive's outlook suggests that the economic benefits from the commodities sector may outweigh the challenges posed by the nation's political landscape.

data.title: Former Palantir Engineer Resigns Over Ethical Concerns
data.description: Alex Bores, a former engineer at Palantir Technologies, resigned from his position in 2019 due to ethical concerns regarding the company's collaboration with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE). Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Bores' moral objections to Palantir's involvement with ICE, which ultimately led to his decision to leave the company. Bores' departure underscores the ongoing debate over corporate responsibility and ethical considerations in technology partnerships with government agencies.

data.title: If the CFTC “only does Bitcoin,” why did it just invite crypto’s biggest CEOs into the room?
data.description:
CFTC Chair forms a new Innovation Advisory Committee packed with crypto, exchange, and prediction-market CEOs Most crypto traders barely think about the Commodity Futures Trading Commission until something breaks, a lawsuit hits, or a Bitcoin futures headline crosses their feed.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/cftc-chair-forms-a-new-innovation-advisory-committee-packed-with-crypto-exchange-and-prediction-market-ceos/

data.title: Bitcoin faces oversight shift as SEC details Project Crypto
data.description:
SEC testimony outlines temporary guidance under SEC Project Crypto as Congress drafts a federal framework, clarifying token taxonomy and licensing impacts.
source: https://coincu.com/news/bitcoin-faces-oversight-shift-as-sec-details-project-crypto/

data.title: Brazil Advances Bill to Build 1-Million Bitcoin Sovereign Reserve
data.description:
A proposal to create a Sovereign Strategic Bitcoin Reserve (RESBit) is moving through Brazil’s Congress, and the latest draft significantly expands the original scope. Instead of allocating up to 5% of international reserves, the revised version calls for the gradual acquisition of at least 1,000,000 Bitcoin over five years.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/brazil-advances-bill-to-build-1-million-bitcoin-sovereign-reserve/

data.title: Grant Hill Discusses Transition from NBA Player to Franchise Owner
data.description: Grant Hill, a former NBA Hall of Famer, has transitioned from playing on the court to owning a franchise. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Hill's insights into how his experience as a player influences his approach to building a team. Hill emphasizes the importance of culture, leadership, and legacy in shaping a successful franchise. His unique perspective as a former player provides valuable insights into the dynamics of team ownership and management.

data.title: BlackRock Enters DeFi with $2.2 Billion Tokenized Treasury Deployment
data.description:
BlackRock has made a significant move into decentralized finance (DeFi) by deploying approximately $2.2 billion through tokenized treasury funds on UniswapX. According to NS3.AI, this marks BlackRock's first direct exposure to DeFi governance tokens, highlighting a growing interest in the sector.

Market expectations for Federal Reserve rate cuts are increasing, with a 30% probability of cuts before April and over 80% before June. This anticipation is influencing market dynamics, as investors adjust their strategies in response to potential monetary policy changes.

In parallel, U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs have experienced $410 million in outflows, coinciding with Bitcoin's decline below $66,000. This has raised concerns about institutional sell-offs and heightened market volatility, as investors remain cautious amid these developments.
